name: The Safeguard Group - Housing & Debt Advisors
description_short: Non-profit credit and housing counselor founded in 1996, offering free debt analysis, mortgage assistance, and bankruptcy education to help consumers meet financial goals ethically.
description_long:
SafeGuard Credit Counseling Services, Inc. was established in 1996 and operates as a non-profit organization dedicated to consumer financial education and counseling. The organization's core mission centers on helping individuals and communities understand fiscal responsibility while providing pathways to financial stability and homeownership.

SafeGuard offers a comprehensive suite of free counseling services including credit counseling with debt and budget analysis, housing counseling for mortgage assistance and first-time homebuyers, specialized HERO counseling for veterans and active military families, pre-filing credit counseling and post-filing debtor education for bankruptcy filers, and a SafeGuard Homes program featuring available properties in various areas. Their services are designed to address multiple financial challenges consumers face, from credit card debt management to mortgage modification and homeownership preparation.

The organization distinguishes itself through its focus on ethical education combined with actionable counseling. Their specific attention to veteran and military families through the HERO program, coupled with the SafeGuard Homes property listings service, suggests a broader community engagement approach beyond standard credit counseling. The emphasis on both pre- and post-bankruptcy counseling indicates comprehensive support throughout significant financial transitions.

As a non-profit certified for housing counseling, SafeGuard provides legitimate free services without predatory lending or repair schemes. However, their website lacks specific information about accreditation details, counselor qualifications, service areas, availability metrics, and measurable outcomes. The calendar showing no upcoming events and limited contact information may indicate outdated web maintenance or restricted service availability.
pros: Founded in 1996 with 30-year track record in non-profit financial counseling
Offers completely free debt and budget analysis with no upfront fees
Provides specialized HERO counseling program specifically for veterans and active military families
HUD-approved housing counselor services for mortgage assistance and first-time homebuyers
Covers full bankruptcy lifecycle with both pre-filing counseling and post-filing debtor education
SafeGuard Homes program provides access to available properties in borrowers' areas
Explicitly states commitment to ethical education and fiscal responsibility principles
cons: Website lacks details on NFCC certification status, counselor qualifications, or HUD approval confirmation
No service area information, geographic limitations, or availability details provided
Calendar shows no upcoming events, suggesting either limited scheduling or website maintenance issues
Minimal contact information (no phone number, email, or office locations visible on homepage)
No outcome metrics, success rates, or client testimonial specifics despite testimonials page existing
best_for: First-time homebuyers seeking free pre-purchase counseling and mortgage guidance
Veterans and active military personnel preparing for homeownership through HERO program
Consumers with credit card debt seeking free budget analysis and repayment planning
Individuals filing bankruptcy needing pre-filing education or post-filing debtor counseling
diagnosis: SafeGuard is best for consumers seeking legitimate, free non-profit counseling on credit, housing, and bankruptcy issues, particularly veterans and first-time homebuyers. The main caveat is verifying current service availability and geographic coverage, as the website shows limited contact details and no scheduled events, suggesting you should directly confirm they serve your area before relying on their services.
services: Free credit counseling with debt and budget analysis
HERO counseling for veterans and active military families
SafeGuard Homes property listings and search service
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
